name: Space Invaders
description:
Space Invaders is a fixed shooter game where the player controls a laser cannon located at the bottom of the screen. A formation of alien invaders slowly descends from the top of the screen, moving horizontally back and forth. The goal is to destroy all the invaders before they reach the bottom of the screen or the player's cannon. The invaders periodically fire projectiles downwards, attempting to destroy the player's cannon. The player can move the cannon horizontally to dodge projectiles and target the invaders. The cannon can be used to shoot upwards, firing projectiles at the invaders. 

There are several rows of defensive bunkers located between the player and the invaders. These bunkers provide temporary cover for the player, but they are gradually destroyed by both the player's projectiles and the invaders' projectiles. 

As the invaders are destroyed, their movement speed increases. Once all invaders are destroyed, a new wave of invaders appears, generally faster than the previous one. The game continues until the invaders reach the bottom of the screen or the player runs out of lives. The score is based on the type and number of invaders destroyed.

controls.arrow_left: Move the player's cannon to the left.
controls.arrow_right: Move the player's cannon to the right.
controls.space: Fire a projectile from the player's cannon upwards.
